metadata.name: Check Customer Eligibility for DER Program

description: A customer is interested in a new battery program. The agent must check if they are eligible based on their location and existing utility service.

nodes.task_description: Verify the customer's address is within the program's designated grid service area.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent confirms the address is in an eligible zone.

nodes.task_description: Check if the customer is on a Time-of-Use (TOU) electricity rate, which is a prerequisite for the program.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent confirms the customer is on a TOU rate plan.

nodes.task_description: Inform the customer they are eligible and provide them with the next steps to enroll.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent clearly communicates the positive eligibility status and enrollment process.
